title: ctenitis oreocharis
intro: Ctenitis oreocharis is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of flavonoids, triterpenoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ctenitis oreocharis include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, protect against cell damage, and prevent infections. Ctenitis oreocharis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
